claims.text: Langfuse is an open-source LLM engineering platform verified against docs/site/examples.
claims.evidence: Langfuse is an open-source LLM engineering platform providing observability, tracing, prompt management, and evaluations for teams building LLM and agent applications.
With Langfuse, we are building open source observability and product analytics for LLM-based applications.

claims.text: Langfuse has an estimated $1.1M ARR claimed as of June 2024.
Langfuse generated $3.4M claimed in annual revenue as estimated based on comparables, with a range of $2.8M - $4.3M.
claims.evidence: StartupHub estimates Langfuse's annual revenue at $3.4M (range $2.8M to $4.3M, 62% confidence), based on comparable companies in the sector.

claims.text: Langfuse has strong open-source developer adoption verified against docs/site/examples.
claims.evidence: Early-stage: strong open-source developer adoption, building out an enterprise offering.

claims.text: Langfuse completed a product launch described in its documentation.
claims.evidence: In our first Launch Week, we reintroduced Langfuse as the AI Engineering Platform and launched essential features to cover the workflow.
